skill1.kitLine: Activates when the last bullet hits the target. Affects all allies. Critical Rate of normal attacks ▲ 14.64% for 5 sec.
skill1.where: skill1[0]: trigger lastBullet → allies, buff critRatePct 14.64/5s
skill1.note: 'of normal attacks' qualifier not restricted in override; inert for SR auto-play where all damage is normal (charged) attacks

skill1.kitLine: Activates when attacking with Full Charge. Affects all allies. Recovers 0.59% of the skill user's final Max HP.
skill1.where: skill1[1]: trigger shotFired → allies, heal event
skill1.note: Modeled as event-only heal (no HP value). Purpose: emit recovery event to drive Crown's 'when recovery takes effect' trigger to near-permanent uptime. 0.59% HP amount is irrelevant to damage sim.
Same block as the heal; fires every full charge (shotFired = every SR pull)

skill2.kitLine: Affects all allies. Damage to Interruption Parts ▲ 3.08% continuously.
skill2.where: skill2[0]: trigger passive → allies, buff partsDamagePct 3.08
skill2.note: Inert vs partless boss (sim scope), kept for completeness

skill2.kitLine: Activates when entering Full Burst. Affects all allies. Attack Damage ▲ 27.87% for 10 sec.
skill2.where: skill2[1]: trigger fullBurstEnter → allies, buff attackDamagePct 27.87/10s
skill2.note: TREASURE value (base kit was 11.85). Restored 2026-07-17 after DB sync.

skill2.kitLine: Activates when hitting a target with Full Charge. Affects the target. Deals 178.98% of final ATK as additional damage.
skill2.where: skill2[2]: trigger shotFired → enemy, flatDamage atkPct 178.98
skill2.note: TREASURE addition. Trigger read as shotFired (every SR pull = full charge). Crit-default per engine convention. ~Doubles sustained charged-shot damage.

burst.kitLine: Affects the enemy with the highest final ATK. Deals 8236.8% of final ATK as Burst Skill damage.
burst.where: burst[0]: trigger burstCast → enemy, flatDamage atkPct 8236.8
burst.note: TREASURE nuke value (base kit 1237.5). Target selection (highest ATK) is inert in partless single-boss scope.

burst.kitLine: Affects all allies. Recovers 54.45% of attack damage as HP for 10 sec.
burst.where: burst[2]: trigger burstCast → allies, heal event
burst.note: Modeled as event-only heal (recovery event emitted). HP recovery amount not numerically tracked; event drives Crown-style consumers. Note describes it as 'faithful-but-near-redundant' since S1 already saturates those triggers.

burst.kitLine: Affects self. Charge Damage Multiplier ▲ 158.4% for 10 round(s).
burst.where: burst[1]: trigger burstCast → self, buff chargeDamageMultPct 158.4/durationSec 13
burst.note: '10 rounds' approximated as 13s (~8 rounds incl. mid-window reload; 10 rounds ≈ 16-17s). See caveat.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2: the 178.98% full-charge additional hit is modeled on shotFired (every SR pull = one full charge); if a focus video shows it not firing every charged shot, retune the trigger
documentedConfounds.why: If the 178.98% hit does NOT fire every charged shot, the override over-counts sustained damage by up to ~50%. This is the single largest damage contributor after the burst nuke. Currently validated at 1.020 mean across 5 comps, so empirically it appears correct, but the trigger assumption is unverified by frame data.

documentedConfounds.text: burst: the 158.4% Charge Damage 'for 10 round(s)' is approximated as durationSec 13 (~8 rounds incl. the mid-window reload; 10 rounds ~= 16-17s)
documentedConfounds.why: durationSec 13 undercounts the true 10-round window (~16-17s) by ~3-4s, meaning ~2 rounds lose the charge buff. This would make the sim slightly COLD on burst-window damage. The 1.020 board read suggests the net effect is small (buff applies to self only, and the nuke already landed).

documentedConfounds.text: Heal events (S1 0.59% MaxHP, burst 54.45% attack damage) are event-only — no HP value tracked
documentedConfounds.why: HP values are irrelevant to damage output. The events exist solely to trigger Crown-style 'when recovery takes effect' buffs. Omitting them entirely would leave Crown+Helm teams ~15% cold (per note); modeling them as events is the correct abstraction for a damage sim.

documentedConfounds.text: partsDamagePct 3.08 is inert vs partless boss
documentedConfounds.why: Sim scope is partless boss. The buff is correctly modeled but never activates. No gap contribution.

authorIntentSummary: The override models Helm (Treasure)'s full favorite-item kit as reconciled 2026-07-17, after a DB sync restored the treasure prose that had been frozen at the untreasured base values (causing a 0.591 COLD board read). All nine kit lines are represented as blocks with no MISSING entries. The two key approximations are: (1) the 178.98% full-charge additional hit fires on shotFired (every SR pull), which is empirically validated but not frame-confirmed; and (2) the '10 rounds' charge-damage buff is approximated as 13s duration, slightly undercounting the true window. Heal effects are deliberately event-only to drive Crown-style recovery triggers without tracking HP. Board reads 1.020 ±2.8% MAD across 5 comps (OK band).
